title: hordeum vulgare subsp. vulgare
intro: Hordeum vulgare subsp. vulgare, also known as common barley, is a type of cereal grain belonging to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hordeum vulgare subsp. vulgare include improving digestion, reducing cholesterol levels, and supporting cardiovascular health. Hordeum vulgare subsp. vulgare is often used to make herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
